---
title: Quarto Template Gallery
---

This gallery is generated from [`data/template-manifest.yml`](data/template-manifest.yml),
which is a local working snapshot of the canonical template list in
[`christopherkenny.github.io/webscripts/templates.yml`](https://github.com/christopherkenny/christopherkenny.github.io/blob/main/webscripts/templates.yml).

Local example builds in this run: 0 passing, 0 failing.

The first CI pass builds the templates vendored into this repo today, while keeping the
full inventory visible so we can grow toward external clone-based builds and filter harnesses.

## Journal templates

### Annual Reviews

For Annual Reviews drafts.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/annual-reviews](https://github.com/christopherkenny/annual-reviews)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/annual-reviews/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="Annual Reviews preview" width="280"}

### APSR

For the American Political Science Review submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/apsr](https://github.com/christopherkenny/apsr)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/apsr/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="APSR preview" width="280"}

### Cambridge Medium

For Cambridge Medium journal submissions, including PA, PSRM, BJPS, SPQ, and more.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/cambridge-medium](https://github.com/christopherkenny/cambridge-medium)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/cambridge-medium/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="Cambridge Medium preview" width="280"}

### Nature

For Springer Nature journal submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/nature](https://github.com/christopherkenny/nature)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/nature/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="Nature preview" width="280"}

### PNAS

For PNAS submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/pnas](https://github.com/christopherkenny/pnas)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/pnas/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="PNAS preview" width="280"}

### PNAS Supporting Information

For PNAS SI (appendices) submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/pnas-si](https://github.com/christopherkenny/pnas-si)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/pnas-si/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="PNAS Supporting Information preview" width="280"}

### Scientific Data

For Scientific Data "Data Descriptors" submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/scientific-data](https://github.com/christopherkenny/scientific-data)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/scientific-data/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="Scientific Data preview" width="280"}

### Perspectives

For Perspectives on Politics submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/perspectives](https://github.com/christopherkenny/perspectives)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/perspectives/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="Perspectives preview" width="280"}

### Science

For Science and Science Advances submissions.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/rticles](https://github.com/christopherkenny/rticles)

Type: RMarkdown (rticles)

Badges: `rticles` `LaTeX`

CI status: This entry uses an rticles workflow and needs a dedicated harness.

### Oxford University Press

For submissions to OUP journals.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/oup](https://github.com/christopherkenny/oup)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/oup/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="Oxford University Press preview" width="280"}

### now Publishers

For submissions to now Publishers journals, including QJPS.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/now](https://github.com/christopherkenny/now)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/now/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="now Publishers preview" width="280"}

## Quarto filters

### wordcount

Insert word counts into the body of a document.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/wordcount](https://github.com/christopherkenny/wordcount)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX` `HTML`

CI status: Filter harness pending

### typst-function

Add Typst functions to Quarto documents using div and span syntax.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/typst-function](https://github.com/christopherkenny/typst-function)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Filter harness pending

### spellcheck

Print misspelled words to the console using Hunspell.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/spellcheck](https://github.com/christopherkenny/spellcheck)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `LaTeX` `Typst` `HTML`

CI status: Filter harness pending

### typst-refs

Move a bibliography using the refs div within a Quarto document.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/typst-refs](https://github.com/christopherkenny/typst-refs)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Filter harness pending

### pseudocode

Generate and style pseudocode for Typst within a Quarto document.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/pseudocode](https://github.com/christopherkenny/pseudocode)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Filter harness pending

## Other templates

### tufte

For Tufte-style documents in Quarto with a Typst backend.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/tufte](https://github.com/christopherkenny/tufte)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Local example configured but not built in this run

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/tufte/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="tufte preview" width="280"}

### ctk-article

A general purpose template for preprints and submissions using Quarto and Typst.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-article](https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-article)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Local example configured but not built in this run

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/ctk-article/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="ctk-article preview" width="280"}

### ctk-memo

For memos in Quarto with a Typst backend.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-memo](https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-memo)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Local example configured but not built in this run

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/ctk-memo/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="ctk-memo preview" width="280"}

### ctk-syllabus

For syllabi in Quarto with a Typst backend.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-syllabus](https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-syllabus)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Local example configured but not built in this run

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/ctk-syllabus/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="ctk-syllabus preview" width="280"}

### ctk-legal

An expert report template with automatically numbered paragraphs using Quarto and Typst.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-legal](https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-legal)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: Local example configured but not built in this run

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/ctk-legal/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="ctk-legal preview" width="280"}

### ctk-invoice

An hourly invoice template using Quarto and Typst.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-invoice](https://github.com/christopherkenny/ctk-invoice)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/ctk-invoice/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="ctk-invoice preview" width="280"}

### cv

For a shortcode + BibTeX powered CV in Quarto with a Typst backend.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/quarto-cv](https://github.com/christopherkenny/quarto-cv)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/quarto-cv/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="cv preview" width="280"}

### projector

Make slides in Quarto powered by Typst's Polylux.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/projector](https://github.com/christopherkenny/projector)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/projector/main/example.gif){fig-alt="projector preview" width="280"}

### harvard-diss

Write a Harvard GSAS Dissertation in Quarto with a Typst backend.

Repository: [https://github.com/christopherkenny/harvard-diss](https://github.com/christopherkenny/harvard-diss)

Type: Quarto

Badges: `Quarto` `Typst`

CI status: External repository integration is planned but not implemented in the first pass.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/christopherkenny/harvard-diss/main/template_1.png){fig-alt="harvard-diss preview" width="280"}
